not_a_verdict: Managed pilot offer with MEASURED variable cost. SUBMITTED for independent verification.
product: NOOS Software Repair Runway — Managed Pilot
customer_provides: one authorized repository (NOOS-owned or allowlisted for the pilot)
noos_provides: bounded repair attempt (model-primary via GitHub Models; deterministic fallback)

measured_variable_cost.model: GitHub Models FREE-TIER (rate-limited) => $0 charged; attributable ~ $0.00014/repair at gpt-4o-mini public rates (456-513 in / 99-123 out tokens)
measured_variable_cost.github_actions_minutes: ~1-2 min/repair on ubuntu-latest (free tier for public repo)

gross_margin_estimate: near-100% on compute at any positive price while on free tiers; conservative >95% if metered.
pilot_price_proposal_founder_editable: PROPOSAL ONLY (founder to set): e.g. onboarding trial (first 3 repairs free) then a per-verified-repair fee or small monthly managed fee. No payment automation for the first pilot.
exclusions: no guaranteed repair of every issue
no autonomous production deployment of customer software
security_model: trust-zoned workflow; untrusted execution has no secrets/write token; forbidden paths never touched; human approval before merge
success_definition: a customer-authorized failing repo yields a test-verified patch/draft PR with an audit receipt
